tagline: Queer pop provocateur. Main character energy.
bio1: Judas is a rising queer pop provocateur who made his debut in front of five thousand people at Electroluxx Pride in San Francisco — and hasn't looked back since.
bio2: Blending unstoppable stage energy, iconic visuals, and fierce choreography, Judas delivers pop anthems built for the main character in all of us. His music lives at the intersection of vulnerability and audacity — confessional lyrics wrapped in club-ready production.
bio3: With two debut singles dropping Summer 2026, this is only the beginning.
